raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu winna zehlahs/tad
pawehleja Boas jaweem Pui-
scheem / un fazzija : lai winna ar-
ridsan starp teem Kuhlischeem las-
fa / un juhs ne darrajt winnai
Raunn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pametteek arridsan preefsch
winnas no tahm Spiritim/un lai-
deet to tur palikt/ka winna to us-
laffa/ un ne funnijat winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta uslaffija winna us
Tihrumu lihds Wakkaram/un is-
kuhle/ ko winna bij uslaffiji/un
tas bija kahda Eepa Meeschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna pazehle to / un
nahze Pilfsahta / un winnas
Mahtize redseja / ko ta bij uslaf-
fijji. Tad iswilke winna/un de-
we winnai / kas winnai ehdoht
bija atlizzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija winnas Mah-
tize us winnu : kur ehti tu scho-
deem laffiji / un kur ehti tu strah-
Dajsi? Swehtihts lai irr/kas tew
irr pasinnts / un winna stahstija
fawai Mahtizei/pee ka ta bij strah-
Dajsi / un fazzija : ta Wihra
Wahrds/ pee ka es schodeen efmu
strahdajti/irr Boas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Naëmja us fa-
wu Weddekli: Swehtihts lai tas
irr tam KUNGAM / kas fatwu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Scheblasfibu ne irr atrahwis
teem Dshweem un no teem ŗ
mirruscheem/ un Naënja faz-
us winnu : tas Wihrs irr mu-
tuwu / no muhsfu Raddeem
wiꞥſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Rutte ta D
abiteru Seewa: Wiꞥſch arri-
man fazzija : Turrajs pee t
Puifscheem/ kas man peederr/
mehr tee wiﬀu Ptautchanu /
man nahkahs/ irr pabeigufschi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Naënja us
wu Weddekli Rutti : Tas irr
bi manna Meita/ ka tu ar wi-
Kalponehm iseij/ ka ne kas Ŗ
Tihrumā tew pretti turrahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta turrejahs winna
Boata Kalponehm / laﬀidan
kamehr ta Meeschu Ptaufscha
un ta Kweeschu Ptautchana
pagahjnsi/ tad palikke winna
tawas Mahtizes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Rutte apgultahs us jawu Wihra Mahte-
dohmu pee Boaja Rahjahm : 1/6. Ta-
dahwina to laipnigi / un apjohlahs w-
preszeht: 10/15. Ja tam twafam Ŗ
tas-rehmejam ne gribbetohs winnu apa
"
    }
